SEARCH

Index

A B C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V W 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

F

findActiveByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries — those whose reservation is still WAITING — in FIFO (queue) order.
findByConfirmationCode(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Looks up a single reservation by its booking confirmation code — the lookup the gate performs at entry, where the visitor presents the code printed on their booking.
findById(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Looks up a single visit by its primary key — used to echo the row just created back to the gate (the casual path has neither a confirmation code nor, necessarily, a visitor id to look it up by).
findByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Lists every reservation owned by a visitor, most recent visit first.
findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the PENDING reservations whose confirmation window has lapsed: still PENDING, already reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NOT NULL), and reminded more than timeoutMinutes ago.
findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int).
findExpiredOffers() - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Lists every entry whose active offer has lapsed — those with an offer set (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) whose grab_expires_at is now in the past, ordered FIFO.
findExpiredOffers(boolean) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Force-aware variant of WaitlistDAO.findExpiredOffers().
findNextEligible(int, String, int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Finds the FIFO-first queue entry eligible to be offered a freed slot: the earliest-queued entry whose reservation is still WAITING for the given park and date, that does not already hold an offer, and whose party fits the freed capacity ("must-fit").
findNoShowCandidates() - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the reservations that the no-show sweep should mark ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW: those still CONFIRMED whose visit_date is strictly before today (a same-day booking can still arrive) and for which no visit row was ever recorded — i.e.
findNoShowCandidates(boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findNoShowCandidates().
findOpenByConfirmation(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Finds the open visit (not yet exited) reached by a reservation's confirmation code, joining reservation to resolve the code.
findOpenByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Finds the open visit (not yet exited) for a given visitor.
findReminderCandidates(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the PENDING reservations due a confirmation reminder: those whose visit (combining visit_date with visit_time, or midnight when the time is null) falls between now and leadHours from now, and that have not already been reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NULL).
findReminderCandidates(int, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int).
findStaffByCredentials(String, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a staff user by username and password.
findUserById(long) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a staff user by their primary key.
findVisitorById(long) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a visitor by their national ID (login-by-ID).
fxml() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the fxml record component.
